siri_text: Friday's workout. Strength: Deadlift, 4 by 6 at 50 percent. Strength: Romanian Deadlift (RDL), 4 by 10 at 45 percent. Strength: Seated Cable Row, 3 by 10. Strength: Hamstring Curl, 3 by 10. Metcon: DT. Rounds for Time: 12 Deadlifts, 155# / 105#, 9 Hang Power Cleans, 155# / 105#, 6 Push Jerks, 155# / 105#. For hypertrophy, focus on chest, shoulders, biceps.
